breakdown: PR adds a comprehensive test file for RewardsBox TypedDict and validates the validate_rewards_box() function rejects invalid data (wrong types, missing fields, extra fields). The Type Safety dimension is strong (TypedDict + thorough validation), but Error Handling could improve with custom exceptions vs boolean returns. Test coverage is extensive with 10 test cases covering various invalid inputs.
key_changes: Added test_rewards_box_schema.py with Tests for TypedDict existence and validate_rewards_box() function
Added validation tests for required fields, type checking for bool/int/list fields
Added validation test for extra unknown fields rejection
Added validation test for non-dict inputs being rejected
Type aliases UserId and CampaignId defined
